## Description

Brief description of what this PR does (fix, new experiment, docs, etc.).

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New experiment
- [ ] Improvement to an existing experiment
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Other (describe):

## Experiment (if applicable)

Which experiment does this change touch? (e.g. `whereami`, `link-shortener`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are limited to one experiment per PR (or clearly scoped)
- [ ] Code follows project standards (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] Experiment runs locally (`npm run dev` / `wrangler dev`)
- [ ] If new experiment: README updated, row added to root README experiments table
- [ ] If existing experiment: README updated if behavior or options changed

## Related issues

Fixes # (issue number, if any)
